category_sources: Official homepage describes Gource as a software version control visualization tool.
source_facts.description says Gource is a Version Control Visualization Tool.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides synopsis and points to the official Controls wiki for options and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/acaudwell/Gource; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official homepage says Gource supports Git, Mercurial, Bazaar, SVN, and CVS log visualization.
